title: Meet Flowy — your AI assistant, now in the dashboard
text: Press ⌘J or hit the Flowy button. Ask about your leads, run commands, get a daily briefing, and draft follow-ups — all from a Copilot-style side panel.

title: Update leads without leaving the dashboard
text: Set a lead to Hot, Warm, Cold, or Booked and add notes right from the lead panel — changes write straight to your CRM.

title: Calendar, funnel, and exports
text: A new Calendar page maps your deal closings and lead flow, Analytics gained a conversion funnel, and you can export leads to CSV or print a client-ready report.

title: Dark mode + command palette
text: Toggle dark mode from the header, and press ⌘K to jump to any page, lead, or action instantly.

title: A completely redesigned dashboard
text: New Microsoft-inspired look: cleaner cards, live sparklines, a lead goal gauge, top-lead scoring, and smart insights generated from your data.

title: Live CRM data
text: Your dashboard now syncs directly with your CRM — leads, pipeline, sources, and activity update every time you open it.
